required_skills: Warehouse Operations Management and Distribution Center Leadership
Inventory Control and Warehouse Inventory Accuracy Management
Inbound Receiving and Outbound Shipping Operations
Warehouse Safety Compliance and Regulatory Standards
Operational Performance Management and KPI Tracking
Process Improvement and Continuous Improvement Initiatives
preferred_skills: Lean Warehousing and Lean Six Sigma Methodologies
Capacity Planning and Space Utilization Optimization
Budget Management and Cost Reduction Programs
Demand Planning Coordination and Inventory Forecasting
responsibilities: Lead warehouse operations across receiving, storage, picking, packing, and shipping functions to achieve service level and productivity targets.
Develop warehouse workforce plans and labor allocation strategies that optimize staffing levels, throughput capacity, and operational efficiency.
Implement inventory control procedures and cycle count programs to maintain inventory accuracy and minimize stock discrepancies.
Manage warehouse management system configurations and operational workflows to improve order fulfillment speed and inventory visibility.
Optimize warehouse layout, storage utilization, and material handling processes to increase capacity and reduce operational bottlenecks.
Collaborate with transportation, procurement, and supply chain teams to ensure seamless product flow and customer order fulfillment.
Monitor warehouse performance metrics and operational KPIs to identify improvement opportunities and drive corrective action plans.
Ensure compliance with workplace safety regulations, quality standards, and operational procedures across all warehouse activities.
